process.title:
How Your Appointment
with an Expert Works
process.ctaTitle: International Standards of Medicine — in Almaty
process.ctaDesc:
Treatment based on international protocols.
Doctors with overseas clinical experience.
Medical documentation in Russian and English.
Support for international patients.

steps.title: Consultation
steps.desc: Meeting with a Turkish expert. We review your symptoms and medical history to understand the full clinical picture.

steps.title: Diagnostics
steps.desc: Analysis of tests and imaging according to international protocols. If necessary, additional examinations are performed immediately.

steps.title: Recovery Plan
steps.desc: You receive a clear, structured action plan — from treatment strategy to lifestyle recommendations.

trust.title: Expertise proven by time and thousands of patients.
trust.verdictTitle:
This is not a routine appointment.
This is an expert decision.

facts.desc: Our specialists have trained in leading medical centers worldwide and speak the language of global medicine.
No guesswork. Only solutions supported by scientific research and clinical data.
We follow the same standards used by leading clinics in Istanbul, London, and New York. (Turkey, Europe, USA)
We specialize in diagnostics when others cannot find answers. In-depth analysis of every detail.

doctors.title:
Leading doctors from *Turkey*
now in Almaty.
doctors.desc: Appointments are conducted by specialists with clinical experience in leading hospitals in Istanbul.

doctorsList.name: Hakan Dulger
doctorsList.bio: Hakan Dulger – Founder of the clinic, Chief Physician, and Orthopedic Surgeon. He has performed over 10,000 successful surgeries and has extensive experience in treating joints and limbs. He specializes in arthroscopic surgery, joint replacement (hip, knee, shoulder), and microsurgery of hand and foot injuries. He utilizes advanced international techniques for the effective treatment of musculoskeletal injuries and diseases.

doctorsList.name: Nihan Ercan
doctorsList.bio: Nihan Ercan – Founder, Director of the clinic, Physiotherapist, and Schroth therapist. Nihan Ercan has 15 years of experience and is an expert in physiotherapy and rehabilitation. She specializes in sports medicine, biomechanics, post-surgical recovery, spinal health, TMJ dysfunction, and women's health. She previously worked as a sports physiotherapist and served as the team doctor for the Turkish women's national basketball team for 5 years. Since 2019, she has opened her own clinics in Almaty and currently works at ReActive Medical Clinic, implementing modern treatment approaches for local and international patients.

doctorsList.name: Ahmetcan Genco
doctorsList.bio: Over 5 years of experience in international departments of clinics in Turkey and Kazakhstan. Specialization: support for international patients, coordination with insurance companies (GOP, direct billing), and development of international partnerships. Languages: English, Turkish – fluent; Russian – working proficiency.

doctorsList.name: Leila Gechgil
doctorsList.bio: Over 10 years of practice. International experience (Kazakhstan, Turkey, Uganda, Georgia). Specialization: Diagnosis and treatment of gynecological diseases, pregnancy planning and management, ultrasound, hysteroscopy, colposcopy, IUDs, and MHT. Languages: Russian, Turkish – fluent; English – B2 level.

doctorsList.name: Mustafa Tunahan Atac
doctorsList.bio: 5 years of practical experience in orthopedic and neurological rehabilitation. Specializes in manual therapy, dry needling, electrotherapy, and rehabilitation using orthotics and prosthetics. Works with evidence-based and personalized recovery programs.

doctorsList.name: Irada Aziyeva
doctorsList.bio: Performs ultrasound examinations of the abdominal and pelvic organs, thyroid gland, blood vessels (BCA), joints and soft tissues, mammary glands, and obstetric studies (I–III trimesters). Regularly undergoes professional development. Fluent in Kazakh, Russian, English, and Turkish.

doctorsList.name: Kamila Bakyt
doctorsList.bio: Develops personalized nutrition programs for children and adults, provides support for patients after bariatric surgery and for those with chronic diseases.

doctorsList.name: Eray Guray
doctorsList.bio: Specializes in orthopedic and sports rehabilitation, working with post-surgical and neurological patients. Areas of expertise: manual therapy, kinesiotaping, Graston therapy, Schroth therapy for scoliosis, and reformer Pilates. Develops personalized recovery and injury prevention programs.

doctorsList.name: Aibota Murat
doctorsList.bio: Patient appointment scheduling, coordination of doctor visits, documentation management, and financial processing. Ensures a high level of service and patient comfort. Education: Istanbul 29 Mayıs University (Economics). Languages: Kazakh, Russian, Turkish, English.

doctorsList.name: Irada Salaeva
doctorsList.bio: Professional nursing care and clinical support.

doctorsList.name: Aishegul Bavdunova
doctorsList.bio: Professional nursing care and clinical support.
